name: WP Internal Link Optimization API
description: The only REST API for WordPress internal linking. Keyword matching + relevance scoring. Link Whisper alternative. Free 100/mo.
long_description:
## The Only REST API for Internal Link Optimization Every WordPress internal linking tool is a plugin. This is the only REST API. Use it from Python, Node.js, PHP, CI/CD pipelines, headless CMS setups, or custom automation scripts. ## Why This Matters for WordPress Developers Link Whisper ($77/yr), Yoast Premium ($99/yr), and Internal Link Juicer are all locked inside wp-admin. If you're building custom tools, managing multiple sites, or using headless WordPress — you need an API. ## How It Works 1. Send your article HTML + sitemap URL (or page list) 2. API analyzes content for keyword matches against your other pages 3. Returns ranked link suggestions with anchor text, target URL, and relevance score (0-100) ## Plugin vs API Comparison | | This API | Link Whisper | Yoast | ILJ | |---|---|---|---|---| | REST API | **Yes** | No | No | No | | Headless CMS | **Yes** | No | No | No | | CI/CD | **Yes** | No | No | No | | Multi-site script | **Yes** | No | No | No | | Free tier | **100/mo** | None ($77/yr) | Premium only | Limited | ## Use Cases for WordPress Developers - **Auto-link on publish**: Script that inserts internal links when new posts are published - **Gutenberg sidebar panel**: Show link suggestions in real-time as authors write - **Headless WordPress**: Internal linking for Next.js/Gatsby/Astro frontends - **Agency bulk audit**: Analyze internal links across 10+ client sites in one script - **Content migration**: Build internal links from scratch after CMS migration - **WP-CLI automation**: Monthly cron job to optimize internal links across all posts ## Quick Start ``` POST /analyze {"article_html": "

Your content...

", "sitemap_url": "https://site.com/sitemap.xml"} → [{"anchor": "caching", "url": "/caching-guide", "score": 92}] ``` ## Endpoints - `POST /analyze` — Full link analysis with ranked suggestions - `POST /suggest` — Quick keyword-to-URL matching Free tier: 100 analyses/month. No credit card required.

endpoints.name: Analyze Internal Links
endpoints.description: Analyze article HTML against sitemap or page list, return ranked link suggestions with relevance scores

parameters.name: article_html
parameters.description: HTML content of the article to analyze

parameters.name: article_title
parameters.description: Title of the article (improves matching accuracy)

parameters.name: sitemap_url
parameters.description: URL of XML sitemap (alternative to pages array)

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Array of {url, title, content} objects (alternative to sitemap_url)

endpoints.name: Suggest Keyword Links
endpoints.description: Quick keyword-to-URL matching for plain text content

parameters.name: article_text
parameters.description: Plain text content of the article

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Array of {url, title} objects to match against

endpoints.name: Health Check
endpoints.description: Check if the API is running

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
